prompt: Logo wordmark on pure black background. The text 'MM AGENCY.' in a single horizontal line, all uppercase. The typeface is an extremely bold, condensed, blocky custom geometric sans-serif with sharp 90-degree corners — like Microgramma Extended Bold. All text is pure white (#FFFFFF). The period/dot at the end is bright yellow (#FAFA00). Wide composition, the text spans most of the horizontal canvas. The letterforms are thick, rectangular, industrial. No icon, no symbol, no graphic element. Pure bold typography on black. This is the hero/large version — dominant and powerful. Vector quality, perfectly crisp, flat design.
